CN: 
Probably one of the more fucked up bots of mine. Made this for myself one night at like 3 am and I was like "well okay I have fellow sickos for an audience so I'll go ahead and make this public" (a lighthearted joke. You know I love you guys <3)

I want beastzai in me tbh 

What who said that ermmm wasn't me!!!

As I'm typing this it's April 28th, even though I made this bot on the 27th. I think the ability to make new character cards public on your page is back, and I sincerely thank the devs for their hard work <3

So, hopefully y'all enjoy this one?? Depends on who's using it. And all the warnings that apply to this bot are listed, so I should see no complaints about this bot doing "weird things" or whatever because that's honestly kinda the point 😭

P.S: Chuuya's birthday is on the 29th and I have something special planned for that day hehe
